mob_tip.lore: §r§aThe abnormal entities brought by the hurricane
mob_tip.burning_golem: §r§c§l-Burning golem- §r§aIt will continuously ignite the ground where it stand
mob_tip.heavy_knight: §r§c§l-Heavy knight- §r§aThe slow and clumsy but extremely tough defenders of the fortress
mob_tip.posion_golem: §r§c§l-Posion golem- §r§aKeep spraying poison fog around. Players who come into contact with the poison fog will acquire the Poison III effect.
mob_tip.echo_giant: §r§3§l-Echo giant- §r§aThese monsters possess a highly sensitive detection ability. When they detect the presence of players around them, they will let mobs gain Invisibility nearby their
mob_tip.death: §r§3§l-Death- §r§aEvery little while, the death will select a player within a radius of 5 blocks to reaper them - the  player who be selected  will be lifted up by the death and suffer 12 damage
mob_tip.dark_tower_mage: §r§3§l-Dark tower mage- §r§aFrequently cast spells, providing darkness effects to nearby players and enhancing the attack power of nearby mobs
mob_tip.soul_of_decayed_knight: §r§3§l-Soul of decayed knight- §r§aThe souls of these Dead Knights pose no significant threat, but if you don't eliminate them promptly, they will return to life as powerful knights.
mob_tip.decaying_colossust: §r§d§l-Decaying colossust- §r§aA type of parasitic wither skeleton knight will interfere with the vision of nearby players
mob_tip.unstable_creeper: §r§d§l-Unstable creeper- §r§aHarder to kill than a regular Creeper, it will occasionally release a wide-range explosion, and it also has the ability to unleash a devastating explosion at the cost of its own life
mob_tip.gluttonous_colossust: §r§d§l-Gluttonous colossust- §r§aWhen a player is nearby, they will attempt to summon ravenous fangs from the ground to devour the player. Players hit by these fangs will receive the Hunger IV effect.
mob_tip.radiance_tower_mage: §r§d§l-Radiance tower mage- §r§aThis highly threatening mage constantly casts spells to summon numerous Radiance Bombs. All Radiance Bombs will detonate simultaneously after a brief delay, with each capable of dealing a lot of damage.
mob_tip.ball_lighting: §r§d§l-Ball lighting- §r§aIt is highly unstable. When a Creeper is nearby, the Ball Lightning will immediately strike it with lightning, transforming it into a Charged Creeper. The Ball Lightning itself possesses a devastating explosive power—if you get too close, it will detonate instantly
mob_tip.ender_knight: §r§d§l-Ender knight- §r§aA type of guard skilled in teleportation magic. They locate nearby players and teleport directly to them. Upon arrival, they immediately unleash a Void Blast that deals armor-piercing damage to all players in the vicinity.
mob_tip.void_creeper: §r§d§l-Void creeper- §r§aA highly sensitive Creeper that immediately unleashes a devastating Void Blast when a player comes within a 3-block radius. Players caught in the explosion will suffer massive damage, regardless of any block obstruction
boss.the_pioneer.door_open: §r§a§l[Caution] §r§eThe door to the Treasure Room has been unlocked!

area14.green.text.2: You can only use melee weapons to destroy the Ender Crystals!
